query:
UPDATE outbox
           SET status = 'delivered'::outbox_status,
               published_at = $1,
               leased_at = NULL,
               leased_until = NULL,
               lease_token = NULL,
               lease_owner = NULL,
               updated_at = $1,
               last_error = NULL
           WHERE workspace_id = $2
             AND id = $3
             AND status = 'leased'::outbox_status
             AND lease_token = $4
             AND lease_owner = $5
             AND leased_until > $1
